name: The City Of Townsville RPG
description:
The City of Townsville! The streets are alive with bustling citizens, the sun gleams down on the city, and the air smells like fresh bread from the bakery. But in Townsville, nothing is ever as simple as it seems. Beneath the calm exterior, strange things are always happening. Also home of The Powerpuff Girls, Townsville’s beloved trio of heroes, are always on alert, ready to jump into action at a moment’s notice.

But that doesn’t mean the city is always safe. It’s a place where supervillains hatch plans, monsters appear without warning, and chaos lurks around every corner. Whether you’re a hero, a villain, or just an everyday citizen, life in Townsville is never boring.
creator: 90sflower
